body.input:
Content: DOC: Lab API2. Parameters
--PlatformVersion same as with update.

--DisableSecureInstall [true|<no input>]

Disables secure platform install feature (Secure Platform feature is enabled by default in versions 7.4.0 and higher.

--ProductionLevel [1-5|no input]
Sets the Production level of the system during an update or install. Default is 2 (development)

Example
./install.sh --PlatformVersion 8.23.1-GA --DisableSecureInstall true --ProductionLevel 5
clear-cache.sh
Clears the platform cache, restart the application server and then check to make sure the Designer Studio is up and accessible after the restart.

Parameters
--clear-database-cache
Clears the database cache tables as well as the system cache.

--clear-cassandra-data
Clears Cassandra as well (used by CDH).

Example
./clear-cache.sh --clear-database-cache --clear-cassandra-data
Restart
This operation will restart the application server and then check to make sure the Designer Studio is up and accessible after the restart.
